headline: Is It Time To Reassess ServiceNow (NOW) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether ServiceNow's current share price reflects its true worth, this article will walk through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. ServiceNow shares last closed at US$116.61, with recent returns of 3.0% over 7 days, 15.8% over 30 days, a year to date return of a 20.9% decline, and a 1 year return of a 27.9% decline, alongside longer term 3 year and 5 year returns of 37.3% and 16.8% respectively.
